focused_beam_size.title: Focused Beam Size (µm)
focused_beam_size.description: The vertical extent of the primary beam at the sample position. 200 um at the sample position means we focus on the detector for maximum reciprocal space resolution.

total_time.title: Data Point Time (seconds)
total_time.description: Total exposure time for each data point in seconds.

q_max.title: Q-max (Å⁻¹)
q_max.description: The required maximum momentum transfer for this collection.

frames.title: Frames
frames.description: The number of data points [at each temperature]. The total time for this experiment will be (data point time) × (frames) × (number of temperatures).
